core_concept: An enterprise-grade autonomous software factory driven by an LLM-based orchestrator.
problem_statement: Small teams lack the capacity to architect, build, and test enterprise-grade software safely.
target_audience: Solo developers and small engineering teams.
user_pain_points: LLM hallucination causing infinite debugging loops.
Lack of structural boundaries leading to messy code architecture.
success_metrics: Ability to complete a 5-day project fully autonomously.
key_differentiators: Strict state machine enforcement prevents AI hallucination
JSON validation gate ensures structured artifact output
13-agent lifecycle covering planning, coding, and QA
key_assumptions: The target user knows how to configure API keys.
scope_boundaries: No graphical user interface (GUI) required for MVP.
